expectations.text: The response treats this as setup-only and does not run recall or capture.

claims.claim: Recall phase was skipped because no cards exist

suggestions.assertion: The response treats this as setup-only and does not run recall or capture.
suggestions.reason: This assertion is ambiguous - the response DID execute recall logic but determined there were no cards to load. The distinction between 'not running recall' vs 'running recall but finding nothing' may not be meaningful for this use case.

eval_feedback.overall: Evals capture the key behaviors but the first expectation conflates two concepts (not running recall vs running but finding nothing). Consider clarifying if both scenarios should pass.
